content:
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo from AnthropicMember-only story

Anthropic released Claude Sonnet 5 today. It gets close to flagship-level performance at roughly a third of the price, and the story behind it is more interesting than the benchmark chart.

7 min read
Just now

--

A senior engineer at Zapier gave an AI agent a two-part job: update Salesforce account tiers, then send a launch announcement to enterprise contacts.
With previous models, that task used to stall halfway through. The agent would finish the first half, lose the thread, and need a human to step in and finish the rest.
With Claude Sonnet 5, it finished end to end. No human stepping in.
That one story is the entire pitch for today’s release. Anthropic just launched Claude Sonnet 5, and it is built around finishing things, not just starting them well.
What actually shipped today
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Photo from AnthropicClaude Sonnet 5 is now live across every plan. It is the default model for Free and Pro users, and it is also available on Max, Team…
